tender.description: Replacement of old and damaged undersized RCC sewer line with 630 mm/710 mm o/d HDPE sewer line from near Hanuman Mandir to near Baba Ajit Darbar Chowk, East Azad Nagar, along Main Raghubar Pura Road, and their adjoining areas, in ward no. 214, in AC
